<?php namespace Spatie\Ray\Payloads; use Spatie\Ray\ArgumentConverter; class TablePayload extends Payload { /** @var array */ protected $values; /** @var string */ protected $label; public function __construct(array $values, string $label = 'Table') { $this->values = $values; $this->label = $label; } public function getType(): string { return 'table'; } public function getContent(): array { $values = array_map(function ($value) { return ArgumentConverter::convertToPrimitive($value); }, $this->values); return [ 'values' => $values, 'label' => $this->label, ]; } }
